title: I Can See You (Anti Invisibility)!
description: This makes it so that you can see invisible players when key is pressed (default:v)
body:
I decided you sould have a way to see invisible players for fun

The default key is v but can be changed in the keybind settings

**This is vibe coded with cursor**

**note: I the creator (me) holds no responsibility of the mods use after distribution some servers might not allow this, use at your own risk**
